signals.raw:
Alpenglow Consensus Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98.27% Approval | YES | HIGH confidence** [4]

Ethereum transactions surged 41% over the past seven days, reclaiming network activity leadership from Solana, while ETH price rose 8.6% to $2,377—breaking above $2,350 resistance but not yet confirming a close above $2,500.[1]
